title: Web pages not loading in Chrome
issue_description: Google Chrome spins forever on any website. Other apps have internet. Started after a Windows update this morning.
resolution_steps: Close all Chrome windows completely.
Reopen Chrome and press Ctrl+Shift+Delete (Cmd+Shift+Delete on Mac).
Clear cached images and files for the last 24 hours only.
Try one website in a private/incognito window.

title: Forgot my login password
issue_description: I forgot my company portal password and cannot sign in on my laptop. I have internet access on my phone.
resolution_steps: On your phone browser, open the company password self-service portal.
Click Forgot password and verify with your work email MFA.
Set a new password following the on-screen rules.
Sign in on the laptop with the new password.

title: Wi-Fi connected but no internet
issue_description: Laptop shows connected to office Wi-Fi but browsers say no internet. Colleagues nearby are fine.
resolution_steps: Turn Wi-Fi off, wait 10 seconds, turn it back on.
Forget the corporate Wi-Fi network and reconnect with your work password.
Open a new private browser window and visit a public site to test.
Restart the laptop if the issue continues.

title: Teams desktop notifications missing
issue_description: Microsoft Teams messages arrive on my phone but I get no pop-up banners on my Windows laptop.
resolution_steps: Open Windows Settings → System → Notifications and ensure notifications are On.
In Teams → Settings → Notifications, enable banner and taskbar flash.
Quit Teams from the system tray and open it again.
Turn off Focus assist / Do Not Disturb during work hours.

title: Laptop running very slow
issue_description: My laptop is sluggish with only Outlook and a browser open. Fan is loud but I only need basic fixes I can do myself.
resolution_steps: Close browser tabs and apps you are not using.
Restart the laptop from the Start menu.
Plug in power — low battery can throttle speed.
If still slow after restart, note the time and apps open for IT follow-up.

title: Zoom video laggy on calls
issue_description: Video freezes in Zoom but audio is fine. I am on home Wi-Fi with no admin access to the router.
resolution_steps: In Zoom → Settings → Video, turn off HD video.
Close other video streaming tabs and apps.
Leave and rejoin the meeting.
Switch to phone audio only if video still freezes.

title: No sound in Teams meeting
issue_description: I cannot hear anyone in Teams. Microphone works when I test it. Volume icon shows sound is on.
resolution_steps: Click the speaker icon in the Teams meeting and raise volume to 100%.
Open Windows sound settings and pick the correct output device (headphones vs speakers).
Unplug and replug headset USB if you use a USB headset.
Leave the meeting and rejoin once.

title: Work email not syncing on phone
issue_description: iPhone mail app stopped showing new work emails. Webmail in Safari on the phone works fine.
resolution_steps: Open Settings → Mail → Accounts and open your work account.
Toggle Mail off, wait 5 seconds, toggle back on.
Force quit the Mail app and reopen it.
If prompted, re-enter your work password on the phone.

title: Printer shows offline on my PC
issue_description: Office printer on floor 2 says Offline in Windows. I printed successfully yesterday. I only need to print one document today.
resolution_steps: Check the printer is powered on and not showing an error light.
Open Printers & scanners and set the correct printer as default.
Click the printer and choose Open queue — cancel stuck jobs.
Try printing a one-page test from Notepad.

title: Excel attachment will not open from Outlook
issue_description: Double-clicking an .xlsx attachment in Outlook does nothing. I can save files to Downloads.
resolution_steps: Save the attachment to your Downloads folder first.
Open Excel manually, then File → Open → pick the saved file.
If Excel asks about Protected View, click Enable Editing only if you trust the sender.
Restart Outlook if attachments still fail to open.

title: Internal website certificate warning
issue_description: Browser warns the internal HR site is not secure. Clock on laptop looks correct. I am working from home with VPN.
resolution_steps: Confirm VPN is connected using the company VPN app.
Sign out of VPN, reconnect, and retry the site.
Try the same site in a private browser window.
Do not bypass certificate warnings — stop and report if warning persists.

title: Authenticator codes not accepted
issue_description: Microsoft Authenticator codes fail when I log in. Phone shows the right account. No admin rights on laptop.
resolution_steps: On your phone, enable Set time automatically in date/time settings.
Wait for the next code cycle and type it immediately.
Try signing in on phone browser to confirm account works.
Use backup MFA method if your company provided one.

title: VPN error 807 on startup
issue_description: I'm getting an Error 807 when I try to start my VPN client. Wi-Fi works but VPN will not connect.
resolution_steps: Quit the VPN client completely from the system tray.
Reconnect to Wi-Fi and reopen the VPN client.
Sign out and sign back in with your corporate credentials.
Note the exact error code and time if the issue continues.

title: PDF opens in browser and is blank
issue_description: PDF from email opens in Chrome as a blank page. File size looks normal in Downloads.
resolution_steps: Download the PDF fully — wait until download completes.
Right-click the file → Open with → Adobe Acrobat Reader or Preview.
If still blank, download again without opening from the browser preview.
Try opening on phone to confirm the file is not corrupted.

title: Wrong keyboard language typing
issue_description: Keyboard types symbols instead of letters after I bumped a key combo. I need to fix input language myself.
resolution_steps: Press Windows+Space (or Ctrl+Space on some laptops) to switch input language.
Click the language icon on the taskbar and select English.
Open Settings → Time & language → Typing and confirm the default keyboard.
Restart the app where typing was wrong.

title: PostgreSQL replica lag critical
issue_description: Production reporting replica lag spiked to 4 hours. ETL jobs failing with FATAL: terminating connection due to administrator command. pg_stat_replication shows wal_sender_timeout on standby db-rep-03.
resolution_steps: Capture pg_stat_replication, pg_locks, and last 500 lines of postgresql.log from primary and standby.
Check network latency between db-prd-01 and db-rep-03.
Identify long-running transactions on primary blocking WAL flush.
Rebuild standby from base backup per DBA runbook BR-DB-17 if corruption confirmed.

title: Kubernetes pod OOM crashloop
issue_description: payments-api pods crashlooping in prod namespace. Logs: OOMKilled exit 137, memory limit 512Mi. HPA at max replicas, error rate 18%.
resolution_steps: kubectl describe pod and collect last 200 lines from crashed container.
Review memory profiling and deployment image tag diff for v2.14.0.
Raise memory limit under change approval and watch GC metrics.
Roll back deployment if regression correlates with latest release.

title: SQL Server blocking chain month-end
issue_description: ERP database blocking during month-end close. SPID 214 waits on LCK_M_IX held by SPID 88. Users see timeout expired in SSMS.
resolution_steps: Run sp_whoisactive and save blocking tree snapshot.
Identify head blocker and owning application login.
Coordinate with finance before KILL on head blocker.
Schedule index maintenance on GL_Posting per DBA change ticket.

title: AD replication failure DC01 DC02
issue_description: Active Directory replication failing between DC01 and DC02. Event ID 1864. dcdiag reports latency over failure threshold.
resolution_steps: Run repadmin /showrepl and dcdiag /v on both domain controllers.
Verify DNS SRV records and w32tm time sync status.
Check firewall RPC rules between DC subnets.
Force replication only under Identity incident playbook.

title: Load balancer health check 502
issue_description: F5 pool api.internal.corp health checks failing HTTP 502 on /healthz. Three of six nodes down after TLS cert rotation.
resolution_steps: Validate backend TLS chain on each node.
Curl /healthz from LB subnet with correct SNI hostname.
Compare cipher suite against F5 SSL profile.
Re-enable nodes one at a time after manual probe succeeds.

title: Redis cluster MOVED errors
issue_description: Cart service intermittent MOVED errors. redis-cli cluster info shows 2 fail flags. p99 latency 340ms vs baseline 12ms.
resolution_steps: Export cluster nodes, slots, and recent failover events.
Inspect network between AZ-a and AZ-b Redis hosts.
Review maxmemory policy and evicted keys during peak.
Controlled failover per platform runbook after sign-off.

title: SAP batch ABAP dump tempdb full
issue_description: SAP batch RDDIMPDP CANCELED. ST22 dump DBIF_RSQL_SQL_ERROR on ZFIN_ACCT. SQL tempdb full reported by DBA.
resolution_steps: Attach ST22 dump and SM21 system log excerpts.
Coordinate DBA tempdb expansion and sort cleanup.
Restart batch instance only after Basis approval.
Replay job variant after root cause in change record.

title: Veeam backup snapshot quiesce timeout
issue_description: Veeam backup failed on VM SQL-PROD-04. Guest VSS writer hung 45 minutes. Processing finished with errors.
resolution_steps: Review Veeam job log and VMware VSS events on guest.
Confirm backup repository free space and proxy mode.
Test backup with app-aware processing disabled once.
Engage DBA for manual log backup if RPO at risk.

title: GraphQL gateway 503 upstream timeout
issue_description: Internal GraphQL gateway 503. Envoy logs upstream connect timeout to orders-service:8080. Circuit breaker open 30% of requests.
resolution_steps: Correlate Envoy and orders-service logs by request ID.
Check mesh mTLS cert expiry and readiness probes.
Scale orders-service and verify DB pool limits.
Tune circuit breaker after stability returns.

title: MongoDB shard migration stalled
issue_description: MongoDB sh-prod chunk migration aborted: cannot find shard. Config server CPU 92%. Balancer reports stalled moves.
resolution_steps: Capture sh.status(), balancer status, config server mongod.log.
Verify shard hostnames in DNS after DR test.
Pause balancer and diagnose orphaned chunks per DBA playbook.
Resume migration in approved maintenance window.

title: DFS-R conflict storm engineering share
issue_description: DFS-R conflict folder on \\corp\engineering has 12,000 files. Event 4412 repeating on file server FS-ENG-02.
resolution_steps: Identify top conflict files and source workstations from DFSR debug log.
Pause replication group per storage change policy.
Authoritative restore on primary after backup check.
Communicate sync moratorium to engineering leads.

title: VPN tunnel flapping AWS
issue_description: Cisco ASA VPN to AWS VGW flapping. Syslog IKE type 240 deleted SA. ISP circuit packet loss 8%.
resolution_steps: Collect show crypto isa sa detail and phase2 stats.
Failover to alternate ISP if available.
Verify PSK expiry and IKE proposals match AWS config.
Rekey tunnel under Network CAB maintenance.

title: Jenkins Harbor robot token denied
issue_description: CI pipeline fails docker push: access denied. Harbor robot account rotated yesterday. Build agents on k8s-ci namespace.
resolution_steps: Validate harbor-robot-prod credential in Jenkins store.
Test docker login from build agent shell.
Update Kubernetes secret in helm values for CI.
Re-run pipeline with buildKit cache disabled to isolate auth.

title: Elasticsearch disk watermark yellow
issue_description: logging-prod ES cluster yellow. 47 unassigned shards. CLUSTER_BLOCK_EXCEPTION disk watermark exceeded on data-07.
resolution_steps: Check disk on all data nodes; find index growth spike.
Curator-archive indices past retention policy.
Raise flood stage only with observability manager approval.
Rebalance shards after disk below high watermark.

title: Whitelist IP for SQL database access
issue_description: I need someone to whitelist my IP so I can reach the SQL database from home. Remote connection is blocked by the firewall.
resolution_steps: Collect the user's current public IP and target database hostname.
Verify manager approval for remote database access.
Submit firewall rule change to allow the IP on the database security group.
Confirm connectivity after the rule propagates and document in the ticket.
